# Cleanroom Door Hardware Engineering: Hinge Design, Seal Compression, and Maintenance Accessibility

## 适用受众
CTO

## 写作角度说明
门的硬件组件（铰链、闭门器、密封条）看似简单，却是设备可靠性的关键。本角度从硬件工程角度帮助 CTO 评估供应商的工艺水平。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Hardware component quality—hinge bearing capacity, door closer force rating, seal compression consistency—reveals manufacturing precision that directly impacts long-term operational reliability.

## 参考素材
- Hinge specifications: 304 stainless steel material, load capacity (120KG tested), adjustment capability
- Door closer force: EN 1154 standards, adjustable closing speed/latching action
- Seal compression mechanism: mechanical design for consistent pressure distribution
- Emergency egress requirements: panic hardware, fail-open capability (where permitted)
- Maintenance accessibility: component replaceability, spare parts availability, field serviceability

## 关键词
Hinge Engineering, Door Closer, Seal Compression, EN 1154, Hardware Durability, Maintenance Design, Spare Parts
